title: Varahi Deula
tagline: Varahi Deula — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Barahi Deula (Odia:ବାରାହୀ ଦେଉଳ) is an ancient 10th century built temple situated on the eastern coast of Odisha in Puri district, India.
overview.description: Barahi Deula (Odia:ବାରାହୀ ଦେଉଳ) is an ancient 10th century built temple situated on the eastern coast of Odisha in Puri district, India. The barahi temple of Chaurasi is unique in more than one way. The image enshrined in this temple is considered to be one of the masterpieces among the images of the deity found all over India.

topPlaces.name: Durga Temple, Motia
topPlaces.description: The temple of Kanak Durga is located near Krushnaprasad village in an area called Nua Satanga and Motia in Cuttack district, Odisha, India. The temple is dedicated to Mahishamardini and Chamunda.

topPlaces.name: Basudeipur
topPlaces.description: Basudeipur is a village in the Gop block of Puri district, Odisha state of India.

items.note: The temple of Kanak Durga is located near Krushnaprasad village in an area called Nua Satanga and Motia in Cuttack district, Odisha, India. The temple is dedicated to Mahishamardini and Chamunda.
Basudeipur is a village in the Gop block of Puri district, Odisha state of India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Varahi Deula?
faq.a: The best time to visit Varahi Deula is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Varahi Deula?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (38 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (38 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Varahi Deula?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Varahi Deula at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Varahi Deula?
faq.a: Stays in Varahi Deula start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Varahi Deula?
faq.a: The top attractions are Durga Temple, Motia, Basudeipur.
